name: Marina Domek [Fear and Hunger : Termina]
description: [🔪] Marina carves a sigil on your face. ჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻ MORE FUNGER BOTS YIPPEE!! Also, I might continue my funger bots after I finish the ones planned, which can be seen in my bio teehee :3 Anyway, sorry that I might take a long time to make bots. Scenarios are what I struggle with the most so yeah. I might start requests once the fear and hunger bots are all out, but that'll be a while, and other non-funger-related bots will come out in the meantime. ჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻ [laefisilritorno on Twitter]
